epics.title: Payment Gateway Integration
epics.description: Integration with a payment gateway (Stripe) for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments, so that I can purchase products and services online
stories.description: Integrate Stripe payment gateway for secure credit card transactions
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes a credit card payment and updates the order status to 'paid'
The system handles declined credit card payments and displays an error message to the customer

tasks.title: Set up Stripe payment gateway API keys and configure payment settings
tasks.description: Configure Stripe API keys, payment settings, and webhook endpoints

tasks.title: Implement credit card payment form and tokenization
tasks.description: Create a secure payment form, tokenize credit card information, and send payment requests to Stripe

tasks.title: Test and validate credit card payment processing
tasks.description: Test credit card payment processing with different payment methods and edge cases

stories.title: As a customer, I want to manage my subscriptions, so that I can update or cancel my recurring payments
stories.description: Implement subscription management features using Stripe's subscription API
acceptance_criteria: The system allows customers to update their subscription plans and billing information
The system cancels subscriptions and updates the customer's account status when requested

tasks.title: Implement subscription plan management and updates
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for subscription plan updates and integrate with Stripe's subscription API

tasks.title: Develop subscription cancellation and refund logic
tasks.description: Implement subscription cancellation and refund processing using Stripe's API

tasks.title: Test and validate subscription management features
tasks.description: Test subscription plan updates, cancellations, and refunds with different scenarios

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to receive payment event notifications, so that I can track and manage payment-related activities
stories.description: Implement webhook handling for payment events and send email notifications
acceptance_criteria: The system receives and processes payment event webhooks from Stripe (e.g., payment succeeded, payment failed)
The system sends email notifications to customers and administrators for successful payments and payment-related events

tasks.title: Set up and configure Stripe webhook endpoints
tasks.description: Configure Stripe webhook endpoints and implement event handling logic

tasks.title: Develop email notification templates and sending logic
tasks.description: Create email notification templates and implement email sending logic for payment-related events

tasks.title: Test and validate payment event handling and email notifications
tasks.description: Test payment event handling and email notifications with different payment scenarios

epics.title: User Authentication System
epics.description: A comprehensive system for user authentication, including login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration

stories.title: As a user, I want to login to the system using email and password, so that I can access my account
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using their email and password
acceptance_criteria: The system should validate the user's email and password
The system should redirect the user to the dashboard after successful login
The system should display an error message if the email or password is incorrect

tasks.title: Implement email and password validation
tasks.description: Create a function to validate user email and password

tasks.title: Create login page with form submission
tasks.description: Design and implement the login page with form submission

tasks.title: Implement login redirect and error handling
tasks.description: Create a function to redirect the user to the dashboard after successful login and handle error messages

stories.title: As a new user, I want to signup for an account, so that I can use the system
stories.description: The system should allow new users to signup for an account
acceptance_criteria: The system should validate the user's email and password during signup
The system should send a verification email to the user after signup
The system should create a new user account after successful verification

tasks.title: Implement email and password validation during signup
tasks.description: Create a function to validate user email and password during signup

tasks.title: Create signup page with form submission
tasks.description: Design and implement the signup page with form submission

tasks.title: Implement email verification and account creation
tasks.description: Create a function to send a verification email and create a new user account after successful verification

stories.title: As a user, I want to reset my password, so that I can recover my account
stories.description: The system should allow users to reset their password
acceptance_criteria: The system should send a password reset email to the user
The system should validate the password reset token
The system should update the user's password after successful reset

tasks.title: Implement password reset email sending
tasks.description: Create a function to send a password reset email to the user

tasks.title: Create password reset page with form submission
tasks.description: Design and implement the password reset page with form submission

tasks.title: Implement password reset token validation and password update
tasks.description: Create a function to validate the password reset token and update the user's password

stories.title: As a user, I want to login using OAuth with Google and GitHub, so that I can access my account easily
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using OAuth with Google and GitHub
acceptance_criteria: The system should redirect the user to the OAuth authorization page
The system should handle the OAuth callback and authenticate the user
The system should create a new user account if the user does not exist

tasks.title: Implement OAuth authorization page redirect
tasks.description: Create a function to redirect the user to the OAuth authorization page

tasks.title: Implement OAuth callback handling and user authentication
tasks.description: Create a function to handle the OAuth callback and authenticate the user

tasks.title: Implement new user account creation during OAuth login
tasks.description: Create a function to create a new user account if the user does not exist during OAuth login

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.description: A system for sending transactional emails to users for important events

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive a welcome email when I sign up, so that I can confirm my account and get started
stories.description: The system should send a welcome email to new users with a confirmation link
acceptance_criteria: The welcome email is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of signing up
The welcome email contains a unique confirmation link that expires after 24 hours
The welcome email is sent using a customizable email template

tasks.title: Implement email template engine
tasks.description: Set up an email template engine to render customizable email templates

tasks.title: Integrate with SendGrid for email sending
tasks.description: Configure SendGrid API to send emails from the system

tasks.title: Develop welcome email sending logic
tasks.description: Write code to trigger the welcome email sending when a new user signs up

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive a password reset link when I forget my password, so that I can recover my account
stories.description: The system should send a password reset link to the user's registered email address
acceptance_criteria: The password reset link is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of requesting a password reset
The password reset link is valid for 30 minutes and can only be used once
The password reset link is sent using a secure email template

tasks.title: Implement password reset link generation
tasks.description: Write code to generate a unique password reset link for each user

tasks.title: Develop password reset email sending logic
tasks.description: Write code to trigger the password reset email sending when a user requests a password reset

tasks.title: Test password reset link functionality
tasks.description: Test the password reset link functionality to ensure it works as expected

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive payment receipts for my transactions, so that I can keep track of my payments
stories.description: The system should send payment receipts to the user's registered email address
acceptance_criteria: The payment receipt is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of completing a transaction
The payment receipt contains the transaction details, including date, amount, and payment method
The payment receipt is sent using a customizable email template

tasks.title: Develop payment receipt email template
tasks.description: Design and implement a customizable email template for payment receipts

tasks.title: Integrate with payment gateway for transaction data
tasks.description: Configure the payment gateway to send transaction data to the system

tasks.title: Implement payment receipt sending logic
tasks.description: Write code to trigger the payment receipt sending when a transaction is completed

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to customize email templates, so that I can personalize the email content
stories.description: The system should allow administrators to customize email templates
acceptance_criteria: The system provides a user-friendly interface for administrators to customize email templates
The customized email templates are used for sending emails to users
The system validates the customized email templates to ensure they are valid and secure

tasks.title: Design email template customization interface
tasks.description: Design a user-friendly interface for administrators to customize email templates

tasks.title: Implement email template validation
tasks.description: Write code to validate customized email templates to ensure they are valid and secure

tasks.title: Develop email template saving and retrieval logic
tasks.description: Write code to save and retrieve customized email templates

epics.title: Admin Dashboard
epics.description: A dashboard for internal team to manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics

stories.title: As an admin, I want to manage users, so that I can control access to the platform
stories.description: The admin should be able to create, edit, and delete users, as well as assign roles and permissions
acceptance_criteria: The admin can create a new user with a unique username and password
The admin can edit an existing user's role and permissions
The admin can delete a user and all associated data
The system prevents duplicate usernames and invalid password formats

tasks.title: Design and implement user management database schema
tasks.description: Create a database schema to store user data, including usernames, passwords, roles, and permissions

tasks.title: Develop user management UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components for creating, editing, and deleting users, including input validation and error handling

tasks.title: Implement user management business logic and API endpoints
tasks.description: Write business logic and API endpoints to handle user management requests, including authentication and authorization

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view analytics dashboards, so that I can monitor platform performance
stories.description: The admin should be able to view real-time analytics, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view real-time analytics data, including active users and revenue
The admin can view historical analytics data, including system performance metrics
The system updates analytics data in real-time, with a latency of less than 1 minute
The system handles missing or invalid analytics data, displaying a meaningful error message

tasks.title: Design and implement analytics data pipeline
tasks.description: Create a data pipeline to collect, process, and store analytics data, including real-time and historical data

tasks.title: Develop analytics dashboard UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to display analytics data, including charts, graphs, and tables

tasks.title: Implement analytics API endpoints and data processing
tasks.description: Write API endpoints and data processing logic to handle analytics requests, including data aggregation and filtering

stories.title: As an admin, I want to monitor system health, so that I can identify and resolve issues
stories.description: The admin should be able to view system performance metrics, including error logs and system resource utilization
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view system performance metrics, including CPU and memory utilization
The admin can view error logs, including error messages and timestamps
The system updates system health data in real-time, with a latency of less than 1 minute
The system handles missing or invalid system health data, displaying a meaningful error message

tasks.title: Design and implement system health monitoring database schema
tasks.description: Create a database schema to store system health data, including performance metrics and error logs

tasks.title: Develop system health monitoring UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to display system health data, including charts, graphs, and tables

tasks.title: Implement system health monitoring API endpoints and data processing
tasks.description: Write API endpoints and data processing logic to handle system health requests, including data aggregation and filtering

stories.title: As an admin, I want to configure the platform, so that I can customize settings and preferences
stories.description: The admin should be able to configure platform settings, including user roles and permissions, analytics data retention, and system health monitoring thresholds
acceptance_criteria: The admin can configure user roles and permissions
The admin can configure analytics data retention policies
The admin can configure system health monitoring thresholds
The system saves and applies configuration changes correctly, with no data loss or corruption

tasks.title: Design and implement configuration management database schema
tasks.description: Create a database schema to store configuration data, including user roles and permissions, analytics data retention policies, and system health monitoring thresholds

tasks.title: Develop configuration management UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to configure platform settings, including input validation and error handling

tasks.title: Implement configuration management business logic and API endpoints
tasks.description: Write business logic and API endpoints to handle configuration requests, including authentication and authorization

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view real-time analytics, so that I can make data-driven decisions
stories.description: The admin should be able to view real-time analytics data, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view real-time analytics data, including active users and revenue
The admin can view real-time system performance metrics, including CPU and memory utilization
The system updates real-time analytics data in real-time, with a latency of less than 1 minute
The system handles missing or invalid real-time analytics data, displaying a meaningful error message

tasks.title: Implement real-time analytics data processing and aggregation
tasks.description: Write data processing logic to handle real-time analytics requests, including data aggregation and filtering

tasks.title: Develop real-time analytics UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to display real-time analytics data, including charts, graphs, and tables

tasks.title: Integrate real-time analytics with existing analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Integrate real-time analytics data with existing analytics dashboard, including data visualization and filtering
